vocabulary.example_sentence: She changed the position of the photo on her memory board.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她调整了记忆板上那张照片的位置。

vocabulary.example_sentence: A wave of sadness hit him when the old song ended.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 老歌结束时，一阵悲伤涌上心头。

vocabulary.example_sentence: I ran out of time before I could finish the memory quiz.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我还没做完记忆测验时间就耗尽了。

vocabulary.example_sentence: How did you react when you heard your grandpa's voice on the tape?
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 听到磁带里爷爷的声音时你作何反应？

vocabulary.example_sentence: Do not mix up the dates of the two family picnics.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 别把两次家庭野餐的日期搞混了。

vocabulary.example_sentence: She put her old diary to good use by turning entries into a story.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她把旧日记好好利用，把条目改成了故事。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Each happy memory formed a chain that led back to childhood.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 每一段快乐回忆连成链，引回童年。

vocabulary.example_sentence: A stable routine helps long-term memories settle in.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 稳定的作息有助于长期记忆沉淀。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The lecture on memory tricks kept the whole hall awake.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 关于记忆技巧的讲座让全场都精神集中。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Retell the story in your own words to fix it in memory.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 用自己的话复述故事，才能把它牢牢记住。

vocabulary.example_sentence: It is easier to memorize a list when you link each item to a picture.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 把每项和图片联系起来，背清单会更容易。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Tick each name you can recall without looking at your notes.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 不看书本能想起的名字就打个钩。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The grandson recorded his grandma singing an old opera aria.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 孙子录下了奶奶唱的一段老歌剧咏叹调。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We went through every ticket stub saved since last summer.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们把去年夏天留存的每张票根都翻了一遍。

vocabulary.example_sentence: What happened to the wallet you lost at the airport?
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 你在机场丢的钱包后来怎么样了？

vocabulary.example_sentence: Keep in mind that feelings can colour how we remember events.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 请记住，情绪会影响我们怎样回忆事件。

vocabulary.example_sentence: In this case, a vivid image helped her recall the address.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 在这种情况下，一幅鲜明画面帮她想起了地址。

vocabulary.example_sentence: In Johnny's case, music unlocked memories he thought were gone.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 就约翰尼而言，音乐唤起了他以为已消失的记忆。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Hearing the opera again brought tears and distant joy.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 再听那出歌剧，泪水与遥远的喜悦一同涌来。

vocabulary.example_sentence: He found a faded ticket from their first picnic together.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他找到了他们第一次野餐时那张褪色的票。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Inside the wallet was a photo that explained her sudden sadness.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 钱包里有一张照片，解释了她突然的悲伤。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The picnic by the grapevine is still her favourite memory.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 葡萄藤旁的野餐仍是她最喜欢的回忆。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Pardon me—I forgot where we parked near the mall.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 抱歉——我忘了我们在商场附近把车停哪儿了。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The airport announcement triggered a memory of saying goodbye.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 机场的广播触发了告别的回忆。

vocabulary.example_sentence: A gunshot in the film made him recall a scary news report.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 电影里的枪声让他想起一则可怕的新闻报道。

vocabulary.example_sentence: As a grown-up, Rick still keeps his childhood notebook.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 长大成人后，里克仍保存着童年的笔记本。

vocabulary.example_sentence: I cannot recall the password I wrote on this page.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我想不起写在这一页上的密码了。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Climbing the grapevine behind the house became a summer memory.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 爬屋后葡萄藤成了夏天的记忆。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Sharing stories with friends can boost your mood and memory.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 和朋友分享故事能提升情绪，也有助记忆。

vocabulary.example_sentence: To start with, write down five facts you remember clearly.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 首先，写下你清楚记得的五条事实。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Phone numbers live in short-term memory unless you repeat them.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 电话号码留在短期记忆里，除非你反复念。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Family photos help move moments into long-term memory.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 家庭照片有助于把瞬间存入长期记忆。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The mind-map technique made the long passage easy to retell.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 思维导图技巧让长段落变得容易复述。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Read the passage once, then close the book and outline it.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 读一遍段落，合上书再写出纲要。

vocabulary.example_sentence: You are more likely to remember words tied to strong feelings.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 与强烈情感相关的词更可能被记住。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Cramming all night will wear out your brain before the test.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 通宵死记硬背会在考试前把大脑拖垮。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We discussed which memory tricks worked best in our group.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们讨论了小组里哪种记忆窍门最有效。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Create a silly image for each item on your shopping list.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 给购物清单上的每项编一个滑稽画面。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The graph shows how recall drops without review.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 图表显示不复习时回忆率如何下降。

vocabulary.example_sentence: From his view, forgetting names is normal under stress.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 在他看来，压力下忘名很正常。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Spaced review is an effective way to keep facts in mind.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 间隔复习是保持记忆的有效方法。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Sleep is like an engine that clears and stores new memories.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 睡眠像引擎，清理并储存新记忆。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Emotion can fuel a memory so it stays bright for years.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 情感能为记忆供能，让它亮好多年。

vocabulary.example_sentence: She whispered the old address she had not visited in decades.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她低声念出几十年没去过的旧地址。

vocabulary.example_sentence: He wrote the password on a sticky note and hid it in his notebook.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他把密码写在便签上，夹在笔记本里。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Her account of the day matched every detail in Bob's diary.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她对那天的叙述与鲍勃日记里的每个细节一致。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Daily practice will increase the number of words you recall.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 每天练习会增加你能回忆起的词数。

vocabulary.example_sentence: A wild squirrel stole a nut while we ate our picnic lunch.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们野餐时，一只野松鼠偷走了一颗坚果。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The story mentioned blood on the stage during the tragic opera.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 故事提到悲剧歌剧里舞台上有血。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Old wounds surfaced when she reread the letter in her wallet.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 重读钱包里的信时，旧伤又浮上心头。

vocabulary.example_sentence: They met at the mall and traded memories over milk tea.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他们在商场见面，边喝奶茶边交换回忆。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Her notebook holds passwords, addresses, and little sketches.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 她的笔记本里记着密码、地址和小速写。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Rick drew a squirrel to remember the word "nut" in his list.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 里克画了一只松鼠来记清单里的 nut 这个词。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Link each nut in the bowl to one fact you must memorize.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 把碗里的每颗坚果对应一条必须记住的事实。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The dolphin show at the aquarium became Johnny's brightest memory.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 水族馆的海豚表演成了约翰尼最鲜亮的记忆。

vocabulary.example_sentence: I instantly recognized my cousin's voice on the old tape.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我立刻从旧磁带里认出了表弟的声音。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Outline the chapter before you try to retell it from memory.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 先列章节纲要，再凭记忆复述。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Only when she felt safe could she fully recall the picnic day.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 只有感到安全时，她才能完全想起野餐那天。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Divide the long list into three groups by topic.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 把长清单按主题分成三组。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Divide the passage into four parts and summarize each.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 把段落分成四部分并分别概括。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Memory training is not one-size-fits-all for every student.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 记忆训练并非对每位学生都一刀切。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Rick uses colour codes to remember dates and names.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 里克用颜色编码来记日期和名字。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Johnny keeps opera tickets in a chain inside his desk drawer.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 约翰尼把歌剧票用链子串着放在书桌抽屉里。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Bob wrote a graph in his notebook showing his recall scores.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 鲍勃在笔记本里画了一张回忆得分图表。
